Bash(node -e "
const profiles = [
  {id:'default',    w:{g:30,r:25,d:25,o:20}},
  {id:'chatbot',    w:{g:10,r:10,d:10,o:70}},
  {id:'seo',        w:{g:15,r:15,d:60,o:10}},
  {id:'pub-google', w:{g:50,r:20,d:20,o:10}},
  {id:'social',     w:{g:10,r:15,d:55,o:20}},
  {id:'photo',      w:{g:20,r:15,d:20,o:45}},
  {id:'video',      w:{g:15,r:10,d:40,o:35}},
  {id:'designer',   w:{g:15,r:10,d:35,o:40}},
  {id:'copy',       w:{g:20,r:30,d:25,o:25}},
  {id:'dev-web',    w:{g:15,r:10,d:45,o:30}},
  {id:'seo-cons',   w:{g:10,r:40,d:30,o:20}},
  {id:'email',      w:{g:15,r:20,d:30,o:35}},
]
const bad = profiles.filter\(p => Object.values\(p.w\).reduce\(\(a,b\)=>a+b,0\) !== 100\)
if \(bad.length\) console.log\('BAD:', bad.map\(p=>p.id\)\)
else console.log\('All 12 profiles sum to 100 ✓'\)
")
